name: golang-github-stretchr-testify-dev
title: golang-github-stretchr-testify-dev
summary: sacred extension to the standard Go testing package
description:
sacred extension to the standard Go testing package
Testify is a Go code (golang) set of packages that provide many tools for
testifying that code behaves as intended.
.
Features include:
* Easy assertions
* Mocking
* HTTP response trapping
* Testing suite interfaces and functions
.
This package contains the source.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-stretchr-testify-dev because sacred extension to the standard Go testing package.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-stretchr-testify-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-stretchr-testify-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-stretchr-testify-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
